name: Boiled Crawfish
recipeInstructions:
1. Fill a 60-quart pot about halfway.
2. Add all ingredients except crawfish, half the liquid crab boil, and 2 ounces of cayenne.
3. Bring to a vigorous boil.
4. Purge the crawfish by placing them in heavily salted water for 10-15 minutes.
5. Add the purged crawfish to the boiling water.
6. When the water returns to a rolling boil, add the remaining half of the crab boil and 2 ounces of cayenne.
7. Turn off the heat and let it soak for 15 minutes.
